programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.desc: Host Howie Mandel gives one contestant a chance to walk away with a stunning $70,000 jackpot!

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers pretend to be bellhops and need to do and say what they're told while assisting unsuspecting guests to their rooms. Then, the guys need to give away tickets to an absurd made-up show they can no longer see.
